item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s01","score":1,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Turn 1 stays asleep and gives the requested entrance-page wording directly, so it fails the required initial triage/brake on the repeated local-repair pattern.
